completed_tasks.name: 05-07: Fix status command DB path resolution

decisions.decision: Used callable default for --index option (Click supports callable defaults)
decisions.rationale: Allows dynamic resolution via Settings at CLI load time without breaking explicit --index override

decisions.decision: Normalized paths with os.path.realpath() in all three searchers
decisions.rationale: macOS resolves /tmp to /private/tmp; context target_id stores user-provided path while documents store resolved path

next_action: Run /gsd-code-review 05 to audit the gap closure changes, then run verification
context_notes: All 3 gap closure plans from UAT are complete. 365 tests pass. The execute-phase workflow was run with --gaps-only flag. Phase-level gates (code review, verification, tracking updates) remain.
